---
title: "Why AI Didn’t Stop Me From Learning to Code"
description: An affirmation based on optimism and caution.
date: 2025-08-08
categories: [Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Learn to Code, Bioinformatics]
draft: false
image: woof.png
comments:
  giscus:
    repo: ammaraldawood/ammaraldawood.github.io
# author:
#   - name: Ammar Aldawood
#     url: https://ammaraldawood.github.io/
#     orcid: 0009-0001-5777-482X
date-modified: last-modified
citation: 
  url: https://ammaraldawood.com/blog/posts/2025-08-05

format:
    html:
        css: styles.css
---

It was June of 2022 when I first decided to delve (back) into mathematics and computation.
This was induced by the fact that biology has been turning into a computational field of sorts due to the advent 
of high throughput sequencing and advanced simulation capabilities. Biology provides a wealth of information unlike any other,
and statistical methods applied through computation and code are shaping up to be the future of the entire field
